creator: rpglover64@gmail.com
text:
I made a jail using ezjail and entered into the jail environment. I
cded into /usr/ports/net-p2p/deluge and did a make config-recursive,
in which I selected the WITHOUT-GTK option for deluge, followed by a
make install clean. when I ran deluged, it exited with no output;
looking at dmesg, I noticed that python core dumped on signal 11 every
time I ran deluged.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net-p2p/deluge
make config -> WITHOUT-GTK
make install
deluged
